---
title: "The Trucking School"
---

<style>
/* ── TTS brand colors ── */
/* Red: #D42B2B  |  Dark: #1A1A1A  |  White: #FFFFFF  |  Off-white: #F9F6F6 */

.tts-hero {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 3rem 2rem 2.5rem;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1A1A1A 0%, #2D2D2D 50%, #D42B2B 100%);
  border-radius: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.2);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.tts-hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: -30%;
  right: -8%;
  width: 350px;
  height: 350px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  border-radius: 50%;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.tts-hero img {
  max-width: 180px;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: none;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
  padding: 12px;
}

.tts-hero h1 {
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 2.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.tts-hero p {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.tts-hero .tts-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.45rem 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.tts-hero .tts-link:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  border-color: #ffffff;
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* Section styling */
.tts-section {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e8e0e0;
  border-left: 4px solid #D42B2B;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.tts-section h3 {
  color: #1A1A1A;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.tts-section ul {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.tts-section li {
  color: #333;
}

.tts-highlight {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #FDF0F0;
  color: #D42B2B;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
</style>

::: {.tts-hero}

<img src="../images/tts-logo.jpg" alt="The Trucking School Logo">

# The Trucking School

<p>Hands-on CDL training for real-world careers</p>

<a href="https://www.the-trucking-school.com" class="tts-link" target="_blank"><i class="fas fa-globe"></i> Visit Website</a>

:::

## Business Overview

The Trucking School is a CDL training business dedicated to preparing students for real careers in the trucking industry through hands-on instruction and practical, job-ready education. The school focuses on helping individuals gain the skills, confidence, and knowledge needed to successfully enter a high-demand field with clear career pathways.

::: {.tts-section}

### The Problem

The business addresses a common challenge in driver training: many programs focus on testing rather than real-world readiness. Students often complete programs without the practical experience needed to perform confidently on the job.

:::

::: {.tts-section}

### The Approach

The Trucking School emphasizes what matters most for career success:

- **Practical driving experience** — real seat time behind the wheel, not just classroom theory
- **Safety-first instruction** — building habits that protect drivers and the public
- **Structured curriculum** — training that reflects actual industry expectations and standards
- **Regulatory compliance** — ensuring students meet all CDL licensing requirements

:::

::: {.tts-section}

### Who It Serves

- <span class="tts-highlight">Career changers</span> looking to enter a stable, high-demand industry
- <span class="tts-highlight">Entry-level drivers</span> seeking their first CDL credential
- <span class="tts-highlight">Individuals</span> pursuing long-term, reliable employment with clear growth pathways

:::

::: {.tts-section}

### Looking Ahead

The Trucking School is focused on sustainable growth through improved systems, operational efficiency, and strategic partnerships. The long-term goal is to scale the business while maintaining training quality, compliance, and a strong student experience.

:::

---

**Role:** Founder & Operator | **Industry:** Transportation & Education | **Website:** [the-trucking-school.com](https://www.the-trucking-school.com){target="_blank"}
